title: Manufacturing
tagline: Cut production downtime by up to 35%.
detail: FloorLogiQ's MES and WMS solutions give manufacturers real-time visibility into every work order, machine status, and inventory movement. Teams spend less time chasing data and more time hitting output targets.
benefits: ISA-95 aligned MES built on Fuuz

title: Logistics & Distribution
detail: From inbound receipts to carrier dispatch, FloorLogiQ connects your logistics workflows into a single source of truth. SCAC-based routing, load management, and EDI integration reduce fulfilment errors and improve on-time delivery.

title: Warehouse Operations
tagline: Inventory accuracy that ops teams actually trust.
detail: Our Fuuz-native WMS gives warehouse teams licence plate tracking, wave management, and scan-to-pack workflows — all synced live to NetSuite. Reduce cycle count time and eliminate costly stock discrepancies.

title: Automotive
tagline: Zero-defect production, sequenced and on time.
detail: Automotive lines demand precision — the wrong part at the wrong time costs thousands per minute. FloorLogiQ's MES keeps work orders, quality inspections, and operator screens in lockstep so your line never stops for the wrong reason.

title: Industrial Equipment
detail: Industrial equipment manufacturers need to track builds, components, and service history with precision. FloorLogiQ ties production data to asset records so your team can predict failures before they happen and keep builds on schedule.

title: Retail Distribution
tagline: Ship faster. Return less. Satisfy more.
detail: High SKU volumes and multi-channel orders demand a WMS that never falls behind. FloorLogiQ's platform handles omnichannel fulfilment, returns processing, and real-time inventory allocation — so your DC keeps up with demand spikes without breaking a sweat.
